topic.title: TRACE Surveys Are Open. 25 Points for Completing Yours.
topic.text:
Hi all - 

You should have received an email with a link to complete your TRACE course evaluation for INFO 7375. If you haven't seen it, check your junk folder.

What you need to do:

Complete the TRACE survey, then submit a screenshot to Canvas confirming you finished it. That's it. Do not tell us what you said. Your responses are completely anonymous and confidential. We just need proof you did it.

Deadline: Sunday, April 26, 2026 at 11:59 PM

Points: 25 points. Free. Easy. No reason not to.

You can take the survey on your laptop, phone, or tablet. It takes a few minutes.

One more thing. It would be genuinely embarrassing if nobody in a branding class participated in the survey. We talk all semester about building a reputation. This is one of those moments. Your feedback directly shapes how this course gets better for the students who come after you.

So please, take five minutes and do it.

— Prof. Nik & Nina
